account.floor_label: No job floor — §28 no-floor job-economics doctrine. All items price from Micro-Format Band or job economics.

printed_laminated.note: No MOQ on this account. All items priced at real per-unit rates starting at qty 1.

concession_phase.note: Relationship Concession phase — Rule 14 deviation acknowledged. All 5 Band A cut vinyl items (1205720, 1186310, 3017435, 3018378, 3010701) priced within this band by design; Band B/C items have their own independent bands.

ai_consensus.note: Would-be normalized band per AI consensus. Normalization planned January 2027.

cut_vinyl_lettering.calibration_note: Band A calibrated 1.0-5.0 sq ft on data points at 2.512-3.202 sq ft (cluster + 3010701 MED). Items near band boundaries (~0.8-1.2 or ~4.5-5.5 sq ft) require 4-wave validation.

large_format.note: Band B — founding data point 3010704 at 7.069 sq ft. 19.3% step-down from Band A. 4-wave AI validated.

sub_1_sqft.note: Band C — founding data point cluster 3010707/08/09 at 0.969 sq ft. 51% step-up from Band A. 4-wave AI validated + final industry audit.

printed_laminated_singles.note: Band anchored at 1230820 ($15.43/sq ft). 1082570 AI-validated at $15.91/sq ft; 1068270 is its direct parity clone at $15.91/sq ft. Band is narrowing.

printed_laminated_micro.note: Sub-0.1 sq ft micro-format band — founding data point 1279000 at 0.097 sq ft. 100% step-up from singles band. Fixed-labor dominance. 4-wave AI validated + final 6-model comprehensive review. Per-label floor ~$2.50-$3.00 overrides $/sq ft scaling below ~0.06 sq ft.

printed_laminated_kits.note: Per-label parity at $10.00/label qty 20. Kit premium ~6% over singles intentional — matched-set collation, multi-label inspection, controlled-set packaging.

ink_rates.default_note: Account-wide standard for ALL Elliott printed/laminated items. Established 2026-06-01. See PRICING_RULES.md §25 and PRODUCTION.md Account-Wide Ink Coverage Standard.

full_bleed_flood_coat.incidental_buffer: judgment-applied; round material total conservatively upward (setup scrap, registration pulls, minor waste). Not a fixed value.
full_bleed_flood_coat.applies_to: All Elliott printed/laminated items — past, present, and future. No partial coverage routing permitted.
full_bleed_flood_coat.canonical_formula: (Orajet 3951 sq ft × $1.21) + (laminate sq ft × $0.2389) + (label sq ft × $0.50) + incidental buffer
full_bleed_flood_coat.note: Full bleed / full coverage at $0.50/sq ft. This is the only ink routing on this account.

low.note: DEPRECATED for routing — historical reference only. Account uses full_bleed_flood_coat exclusively.

medium.note: DEPRECATED for routing — historical reference only. Account uses full_bleed_flood_coat exclusively.

high.note: DEPRECATED for routing — historical reference only. Account uses full_bleed_flood_coat exclusively.

flood_coat.placeholder_note: Historical placeholder reference. Account-wide standard is full_bleed_flood_coat at $0.50/sq ft (see default_coverage above).

flood_coat_safety_red.note: Historical reference for the 1210810 placeholder period. Superseded by full_bleed_flood_coat account-wide standard (2026-06-01).

olympic_blue.pms_note: Visual approximation of PMS 2386 C — not a certified Pantone match. Disclose in quote.

do_not_benchmark.1277970: One-off program peer — historical job-economics pricing, not a catalog rate. Do not use as a pricing benchmark.
do_not_benchmark.1277980: One-off program peer — historical job-economics pricing, not a catalog rate. Do not use as a pricing benchmark.
do_not_benchmark.1277990: One-off program peer — historical job-economics pricing, not a catalog rate. Do not use as a pricing benchmark.
do_not_benchmark.1278000: One-off program peer — historical job-economics pricing, not a catalog rate. Do not use as a pricing benchmark.
do_not_benchmark.3017583: Standalone one-off — historical job-economics pricing, not a catalog rate. Do not use as a pricing benchmark.
do_not_benchmark.3017584: Standalone one-off — historical job-economics pricing, not a catalog rate. Do not use as a pricing benchmark.
do_not_benchmark.1210810: Sub-scope single — excluded from band data points until production-volume acceptance
do_not_benchmark.1082570: Initial order was $42 flat job-economics (not a catalog rate). Production tier table is valid for reorder volumes.

quote_language.tiny_one_off_program: RETIRED (§28 no-floor doctrine) — tiny one-off route removed. All items price from Micro-Format Band.
quote_language.anchor_line_template: Label measures {width}" × {height}" ({sq_ft} sq ft) in {material} — priced at ${price} at your projected monthly volume.
quote_language.pms_caveat_template: {color} is a visual approximation of {pms_code} — not a certified Pantone match.
quote_language.ink_unverified_note: Ink cost is a placeholder pending first production run. Update material_cost_per_unit after run.
quote_language.sub_scope_note: Dimensional scope exclusion: this item is below the 0.5 sq ft singles band floor. Band-consistent $/sq ft applies. Excluded from band data points until production-volume acceptance confirmed.
quote_language.rule_14_note: Rule 14 deviation: benchmarked against a Relationship Concession item. AI consensus band: ${min}-${max}/sq ft.
